title: Why I'm Going To Trim My Position At Airbnb To Buy Booking Holdings

title: Booking Holdings: Still Outperforming Peers And Expectations
text: Booking Holdings reported impressive Q3 results, surpassing expectations and outperforming peers in the online travel industry. The company's strategic initiatives, including the connected trip vision and expansion into alternative accommodations, contribute to its long-term growth outlook and see great progress. Booking continues to demonstrate industry-leading margins and is aggressively buying back shares, providing attractive returns for investors.

title: OpenTable Debuts Annual Top 100 Restaurants List Alongside 2023's Biggest Dining Trends
text: 'Tis the season for holiday celebrations – last year, three of the top five biggest dining days for groups happened in December – book your table at one of these diner beloved spots now SAN FRANCISCO , Nov. 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- As 2023 comes to a close, bringing holiday and year-end celebrations, OpenTable is helping diners select the perfect venue with the debut of its Top 100 Restaurants in America  list for 2023. Featuring an updated methodology using OpenTable diner reviews and new metrics, the list uncovers some of the most in-demand restaurants by OpenTable diners this year.

title: Booking.com Expands Offerings With New Cruise Options for US Customers
text: Booking.com launched Cruises as a new travel vertical for customers in the United States. The move comes in response to the growing demand for cruise bookings in the U.S., which represents a significant portion of the global cruise industry, the digital travel company said in a Thursday (Nov. 9) press release.

title: OpenTable Appoints James Beard Outstanding Restaurateur Ellen Yin to Advisory Board
text: Yin, alongside seasoned hospitality leaders Kevin Boehm, Will Guidara, Hanson Li, Dan Simons and Lien Ta guide OpenTable on its ongoing mission to help restaurants thrive SAN FRANCISCO , Nov. 9, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- OpenTable , a leader in restaurant technology, today announces the appointment of industry veteran, Ellen Yin, to its Advisory Board. Yin founded and co-owns High Street Hospitality Group, a James Beard Foundation Award-winning restaurant group based in Philadelphia which includes the 25-year legacy restaurant, Fork , the recent reopening of High Street and a.kitchen+bar in AKA Rittenhouse Square.

title: Booking Holdings Inc. to Present at the Nasdaq 49th Investor Conference
text: NORWALK, Conn. , Nov. 9, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) today announced that Chief Financial Officer David Goulden will speak at the Nasdaq 49th Investor Conference, held in association with Morgan Stanley at the May Fair Hotel in London, on December 6, beginning at 08:00 ET / 1:00pm GMT.

title: OpenTable Offers 1,000 Uber Vouchers for Rides to San Francisco Restaurant Week
text: With SF dining demand continuing to trail national levels, OpenTable encourages locals and travelers to dine out during Restaurant Week and the APEC Summit SAN FRANCISCO , Nov. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- OpenTable, a Booking Holdings company, is offering 1,000 Uber Vouchers, valued up to $25 each, to diners participating in San Francisco Restaurant Week . The promotion aims to help reignite dining demand amid The City's continued recovery: according to OpenTable's State of the Industry dashboard, San Francisco dining was down 10% in October and down 13% in September, compared to 2022, which reflects slower demand than nationwide levels (respectively down 4% and 6% YoY).
